title: General Board Updates
excerpt: Would be useful to have a way to send / note updates for a board, in addition to individual items on said board.

posts.author: JessicaWM (Jessica Wilcock)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be useful to have a way to send / note updates for a board, in addition to individual items on said board.

posts.author: shoebox (ShoeBox)
posts.cookedHtml: yes. sometimes it is important to update/tag someone to check board contents or inform about multiple changes of a whole board and not only individual items. please add the ability to have a global board update option
